nodes.label: AI as collaborative content creation partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous content creator
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate with the AI, for example, I'll send a pic of my work and explain what service I completed and ask it to create a relevant caption.

nodes.label: AI output authenticity and human touch
nodes.grounding_span: I edit it myself to give it more of a 'human' touch.

nodes.label: AI as last resort for design tasks
nodes.grounding_span: as a last resort I provided all my pricings/services to an AI and included my style, colour pallet and branding information and it made an excellent price list for me

nodes.label: AI in client-facing communication
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't like an AI to respond to comments on socials for me, again because of the human aspect.

nodes.label: AI as necessity for industry demands
nodes.grounding_span: the industry now demands content creation due to the visual aspect of the industry and this is how to attract clients in this day and age.

nodes.label: Authentic human connection
nodes.grounding_span: people like a human touch, and alot of people see their nail appointments as a kind of therapy session.

nodes.label: Business efficiency and marketing effectiveness
nodes.grounding_span: it made an excellent price list for me (to my surprise).

nodes.label: Focus on core craft
nodes.grounding_span: allow me to concentrate of the core of my business (creating beautiful nails).

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative tool
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate with the AI, for example, I'll send a pic of my work and explain what service I completed and ask it to create a relevant caption.

nodes.label: Dissatisfaction with AI output authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: it normally sounds a bit fake, so I edit it myself to give it more of a 'human' touch.

nodes.label: Surprise and satisfaction with AI for design
nodes.grounding_span: it made an excellent price list for me (to my surprise).

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't like an AI to respond to comments on socials for me, again because of the human aspect.

nodes.label: Openness to future AI use for support tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'm sure as time goes on there will be alot more I could use AI to help me with to allow me to concentrate of the core of my business

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to go back and forth with the AI, each time asking it to amend a detail or to change the style of the caption slightly. We usually go back and forth around 5-6 times.

nodes.label: Pragmatic last-resort adoption
nodes.grounding_span: as a last resort I provided all my pricings/services to an AI
